raw_consumer_statement: Erroneous ( fraudulent ) charges were placed on my account from 2 transactions on XX/XX/XXXX for the amount of $ XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX for the amount of {$1500.00}. I disputed these charges when I was reviewing my charges and the large balance increase. I was told that these charges were from 2 separate check advancements processed at a bank for cash. I submitted a dispute in XX/XX/XXXX. When I called back in XX/XX/XXXX ( about 2 weeks ) for an update on the status of dispute ; I was told that I had not completed any paperwork for filing and NONE had been sent or given to me. I completed and returned the paperwork on XX/XX/XXXX for processing. Following up again in a couple of weeks, I was informed that I still needed to additional paperwork to be completed that I was never given before they could begin to investigate this possible fraud on my behalf. I followed through with each NEW request for documentations being made when I call for an update. On XX/XX/XXXX, I asked for update on location of bank where funds were given or copy of signature of checks but no update given and again, I was asked to submit yet another form and no progress on the investigation. I last spoke with them on XX/XX/XXXX requesting update and another form that they say needs to be filled out was given to me! Enough, I need a temporary credit issued on the account or copies of checks issued and location of processing bank location. It seems like they want me to stop inquiring.
